registerForm.invitationHint: An activation email with a link to set the password will be sent to the address above.
registerForm.fakeUserHint: No email — show the password-setup link here for quick testing.
registerForm.fakeUserInvitationHint: After creation, a password-setup link will appear (same page as the invitation email). Open it to set the password for this test account.
registerForm.fakeUserModalLead: Open the link below to set the password (account activation page). The user can then sign in like any other account.
registerForm.successInvitation: Account created. An activation email was sent to the user.
registerForm.successFakeUser: Fake user created. Use the link in the dialog to set the password.
